chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «مَا مَحَقَ اَلْإِسْلاَمَ مَحْقَ اَلشُّحِّ شَيْءٌ » ثُمَّ قَالَ «إِنَّ لِهَذَا اَلشُّحِّ دَبِيباً كَدَبِيبِ اَلنَّمْلِ وَ شُعَباً كَشُعَبِ اَلشَّرَكِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1716 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family, said:
"Nothing has eroded Islam as much as miserliness (shuhh)."
He then added:
"This miserliness creeps in like the creeping of ants and has branches like the branches of a net."
